summary: Completed testing of Hestia Hotel Management Platform - Loyalty Program, Advanced Reports, Mobile Guest App, and Mobile Staff App modules. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 frontend pages load correctly and display expected data.

issues: Sidebar overlaps content on mobile viewport (390x844). The sidebar should be hidden or collapsed on mobile devices. Works correctly on desktop viewport.

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Login successful (200)
GET /api/loyalty/config/{hotel_id} - Returns loyalty config with 4 tiers and 5 redemption options (200)
GET /api/loyalty/stats/{hotel_id} - Returns loyalty statistics with tier breakdown (200)
GET /api/loyalty/members/{hotel_id} - Returns loyalty members list (200)
POST /api/loyalty/points/add - Adds points to member successfully (200)
GET /api/reports/overview/{hotel_id} - Returns KPIs (revenue, occupancy, ADR, RevPAR) (200)
GET /api/reports/revenue/{hotel_id} - Returns daily revenue data with breakdown (200)
GET /api/reports/occupancy/{hotel_id} - Returns daily occupancy data (200)
GET /api/reports/guests/{hotel_id} - Returns guest analytics with demographics (200)
GET /api/reports/channels/{hotel_id} - Returns channel distribution report (200)
GET /api/mobile/staff/dashboard - Returns staff dashboard with today stats (200)
POST /api/mobile/guest/request - Creates service request successfully (200)
GET /api/reports/overview with period=week (200)
GET /api/reports/overview with period=month (200)
GET /api/reports/overview with period=quarter (200)
GET /api/reports/overview with period=year (200)
Frontend /loyalty - Page loads with program name, 4 tiers, 5 redemption options, tabs working
Frontend /reports - Page loads with KPIs, charts, 4 tabs (Receita, Ocupação, Hóspedes, Canais)
Frontend /mobile-guest - Page loads with room info, loyalty points, 6 services, quick actions
Frontend /mobile-staff - Page loads with today stats, 3 tabs (Tarefas, Solicitações, Alertas)
action_items: Consider hiding sidebar on mobile viewport for Mobile Guest and Mobile Staff pages (cosmetic issue, pages work correctly on desktop)
critical_code_review_comments: Reports data is MOCKED/simulated for demonstration - generates random sample data
Loyalty program works but has no members registered yet (stats show 0 members)
Mobile Guest page uses simulated guest data for demo purposes
seed_data_creation: Created test loyalty points transaction and service request during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new modules (Loyalty, Reports, Mobile Guest, Mobile Staff) are fully functional. Loyalty program has 4 tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum) with multipliers (1x, 1.25x, 1.5x, 2x) and 5 redemption options (Diária Grátis 2500pts, Upgrade 1000pts, Spa 800pts, Jantar 1200pts, Transfer 500pts). Reports show simulated data with KPIs, charts, and channel distribution. Mobile apps have service request functionality and staff task management.

mocked_apis.Reports: All report endpoints return SIMULATED/random sample data for demonstration
mocked_apis.Loyalty Points: Points are added with simulated response (no real database persistence for test guests)
mocked_apis.Mobile Guest Dashboard: Uses simulated guest data (room 501, Suite Deluxe Vista Mar, Gold tier, 3500 points)

loyalty_program.config: 4 tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum) with benefits and multipliers
loyalty_program.redemption_options: 5 options (Free Night, Room Upgrade, Spa, Dining, Transfer)
loyalty_program.stats: Member count, points issued, tier distribution

advanced_reports.overview: KPIs with comparison metrics (revenue change, occupancy change, ADR change)
advanced_reports.revenue: Daily revenue chart with category breakdown (Hospedagem, A&B, Spa, Eventos, Outros)
advanced_reports.occupancy: Daily occupancy chart with room type performance
advanced_reports.guests: Demographics by country, purpose, booking source
advanced_reports.channels: Distribution table with commission tracking and insights

mobile_guest_app.room_info: Room number, type, dates, check-in status
mobile_guest_app.services: 6 service categories (Room Service, Spa, Concierge, Transport, Laundry, Maintenance)

mobile_staff_app.today_stats: Check-ins, Check-outs, Pending Housekeeping, Guest Requests
mobile_staff_app.tasks: Task list with priority badges and action buttons
mobile_staff_app.requests: Guest request list with attend button
